DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_CALL]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_CALL]
( 
	[CallID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AgentEmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ColdCallListID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ColdCallDetailID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallQueueDetailID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[F9_Campaign] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[F9_IVRTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_RingTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ParkTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_AfterCallWorkTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Transfers] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Conferences] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Holds] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Abandoned] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_CustomerName] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[F9_Recordings] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[F9_CallID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_SessionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_LeadScore] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[F9_ANR_Logit_Rank] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ListName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ANR_EV_Rank] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ServiceLevel] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_CampaignType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Skill] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[F9_AgentGroup] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_LPRecType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_SpeedOfAnswer] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_NoPartyContact] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Contacted] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_LiveConnect] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_DialTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_TimeToAbandon] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_TalkTIme] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ManualTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_TotalQueue] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_ConsultTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_TalkTimeLessHoldAndPark] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Parks] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_PreviewTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Number1] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Source] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[F9_SubSource] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[F9_Language] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[F9_Agent] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_CallID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AgentEmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CallTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_CallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_ColdCallListID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ColdCallDetailID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CallQueueDetailID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [CallID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
